title: Create scripts/discover.ts - auto-discovery script
acceptance_criteria: Script scans html/ directory recursively for .html files
Extracts @presentation metadata from HTML comment on line 2
Validates metadata against required schema (id, title, subject, year, topic, description, tags, author, version, created, updated, slides, duration, difficulty, libraries, thumbnail)
Writes public/api/manifest.json with array of presentation objects
Writes public/llms.txt with presentation summaries for LLM consumption
Writes public/.well-known/ai-plugin.json with AI plugin manifest
Handles missing/invalid metadata gracefully with warnings
Runs via 'npm run discover' without errors
